title: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Apr 06, 2015 11:17 am Well, I've decided that my next translation project will be Girlfriend of Steel 2nd. Now, I've only started so this is more or less just an announcement. However, I will stick this through till the end and finish the game. That said, I recorded the start sequence of the game and put it on YouTube so you might want to check that out if you're interested, and also my blog and twitter for updates down the line, too. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NEQ_h6HioiE Update I uploaded the first chapter to download as a demo of sorts, so check that out if you're interested. The link is below. http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/06/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of.html Update 7th August - Full TL Released http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/08/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of_7.html Update 11th August - Kaworu-kun Ending Patch http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/08/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of_11.html

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation             Quote Post by db84x » Sat Jul 09, 2016 7:48 am Thanks for translation anyway

Article: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation
[]: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Apr 06, 2015 11:17 am Well, I've decided that my next translation project will be Girlfriend of Steel 2nd. Now, I've only started so this is more or less just an announcement. However, I will stick this through till the end and finish the game. That said, I recorded the start sequence of the game and put it on YouTube so you might want to check that out if you're interested, and also my blog and twitter for updates down the line, too. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NEQ_h6HioiE Update I uploaded the first chapter to download as a demo of sorts, so check that out if you're interested. The link is below. http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/06/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of.html Update 7th August - Full TL Released http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/08/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of_7.html Update 11th August - Kaworu-kun Ending Patch http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/08/neon-genesis-evangelion-girlfriend-of_11.html

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel 2nd English Translation             Quote Post by db84x » Sat Jul 09, 2016 7:48 am Thanks for translation anyway
